name: deployment_enabled=false → Gate 3 skipped (VACUOUS_SKIP) → COMPLETE without deploy step
description: Drives loop to DEPLOYMENT_OR_END, then calls shouldSkipGate3({deployment_enabled: false}). Returns true (conservative-fire Option A, Stage 10.3 binding: skip ONLY when deployment_enabled===false). Gate 3 is NOT fired; instead _advance is called with transition_type=VACUOUS_SKIP, transitioning DEPLOYMENT_OR_END → LIVE_DELIVERABLE. Loop then advances LIVE_DELIVERABLE → COMPLETE. Audit log has a VACUOUS_SKIP row and no GATE_APPROVE row with owner_gate_id=3. vision.md is NOT modified (vision_locked:true). project_config is injected at driver level — not from vision.md. Plan §2 closure criterion 5.
